failedItems: List endpoints support pagination (limit/offset or cursor) — add pagination parameters and enforce page-bounded query execution for template listing.
Response payloads are bounded — no unbounded queries returning all rows — apply default/max page size and return only bounded template results.

LLD coverage is verified — generated code is checked against the approved Low-Level Design to confirm all required modules, flows, interfaces, validations, and edge cases are implemented — align document generation/review endpoint contracts with the approved component spec paths and close the resulting traceability gap.
Sensitive data (passwords, tokens, PII) is not logged — stop logging Idempotency-Key values and redact token-like identifiers from service logs.

Alerts or notifications are triggered on repeated job failures — integrate JobFailureAlert escalation with an actual notification channel (for example webhook/email/incident system), not only DB persistence.

File path traversal is prevented in any file-serving or file-reading logic — harden BrandingStorageClient/DocumentStorageClient path canonicalization to reject rooted/drive-qualified inputs and enforce base-path containment checks.
summary: Implementation is not fully checklist-compliant: core API and DB foundations are strong, but pagination/bounded-list behavior, LLD traceability alignment, sensitive log redaction, actionable failure alerting, and storage path hardening remain incomplete.
